p.c: function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](r)
function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T1) { x0.smul(T0.1, x1) = x1 }[F, V](m, v)

goal: m.smul(r, m.smul(r.inverse, v)) = m.smul(r * r.inverse, v)

p.c: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0.smul(x1 * x2, x3) = x0.smul(x1, x0.smul(x2, x3)) }[F, V](m, r, r.inverse, v)

goal: m.smul(r * r.inverse, v) = m.smul(r, m.smul(r.inverse, v))

p.c: function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[F](r, r.inverse)

goal: m.smul(r.inverse, m.smul(r, v)) = m.smul(r.inverse * r, v)

p.c: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0.smul(x1 * x2, x3) = x0.smul(x1, x0.smul(x2, x3)) }[F, V](m, r.inverse, r, v)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](r)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[F](r, r.inverse)

goal: m.smul(r.inverse, m.smul(r, v)) = m.smul(r.inverse * r, v)

p.c: function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](r)

goal: m.smul(r, m.smul(r.inverse, v)) = m.smul(r * r.inverse, v)
m.smul(r.inverse, m.smul(r, u)) = m.smul(r.inverse, m.smul(r, v))
m.smul(r, v) + -m.smul(s, v) = m.smul(s, v) + -m.smul(s, v)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[V](m.smul(s, v))

goal: m.smul(r + -s, v) = m.smul(r, v) + m.smul(-s, v)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[F](r, -s, s)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[F](r, -s + s)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[F](r)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[F](s)
function[T0: Field, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: T1) { x0.smul(x1, x2) != x0.smul(x1, x3) or T0.0 = x1 or x2 = x3 }[F, V](m, r, v, u)
function[T0: Field, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: T0) { x0.smul(x1, x2) != x0.smul(x3, x2) or T1.0 = x2 or x1 = x3 }[F, V](m, s, v, r)
function[T0: Field, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: T1) { x0.smul(x1, x2) != x3 or x0.smul(x1.inverse, x3) = x2 or T0.0 = x1 }[F, V](m, r, v, u)
